Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui

package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
Defines top-level user interface composition and wiring.

UI classes in this package coordinate windows, controllers, and navigation used by the bookkeeping desktop experience.

Responsibilities:

  • Assemble primary interface flow.
  • Coordinate interaction between UI modules.
  • Bridge UI events to service-layer operations.
Since:
1.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    nonprofitbookkeeping
    Coordinates the nonprofit bookkeeping application.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions
    Contains reusable UI action handlers.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.help
    Contains help and guidance UI components.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
    Provides UI helper utilities and support classes.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
    Contains UI panel implementations for major screens.

    MainApplicationView
    Represents the main application view, structured as a BorderPane.
    MainApplicationView.PanelType
    Enum defining the different types of panels/tabs that can be displayed in the main application view.

    Main JavaFX application class for Nonprofit Bookkeeping.

    ThemeManager
